overall.description: A cinematic game sequence from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai riding a horse along coastal cliffs at sunset. The journey transitions from a high cliff overlook down through wooded trails to a rocky shoreline, with a mysterious traditional ship visible in the distance throughout.

events.description: location text 'Sazae Oni Shores' appears in the lower right corner

agents.ego_description: sitting on horseback at the cliff edge, overlooking the ocean and distant ship

entered.detail: calm sea with gentle waves and white foam trails visible in the distance
large traditional wooden ship with tall cross-shaped mast silhouetted against the purple sunset
rocky cliff dropping off sharply to the ocean below
vibrant purple and pink gradient sky with scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a high coastal cliff at sunset, with the camera positioned behind a samurai on horseback overlooking the ocean. The water stretches to the horizon where a mysterious ship with a cross-shaped mast is silhouetted against the purple sky. The location text 'Sazae Oni Shores' appears as the character begins to move forward.

events.description: location text 'Sazae Oni Shores' fades from the screen

agents.ego_description: riding horseback along the narrow cliffside path with the ocean visible to the right

entered.detail: steep moss-covered rock wall rising on the left side of the path
scattered pine and deciduous trees lining the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character rides along a narrow dirt trail hugging the cliffside, with a steep rock face on the left and the ocean visible to the right. The location text fades as the path becomes more enclosed by trees and the rocky terrain. The distant ship remains visible on the horizon to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded coastal trail between cliff and forest

agents.ego_description: riding through the enclosed forested section with dense trees on both sides

entered.detail: tall pine trees creating a canopy over the right side of the path
wooden posts and railings along the cliff edge side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a densely wooded section with tall pine trees flanking both sides, creating a more enclosed feeling. Wooden barriers appear along the left side near the cliff edge. The ocean and ship are temporarily obscured by the thick vegetation as the horse continues along the winding path.

events.description: exiting the wooded trail onto the open rocky shore with ocean view
horse descends from cliff path down to rocky beach level

agents.ego_description: riding down the rocky slope toward the shoreline, following an NPC walking ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the path toward the shore

entered.detail: rocky beach terrain with large boulders and uneven ground
turquoise water with white wave crests breaking near the shore
the traditional ship now visible from shore level, appearing larger and closer
white foam from waves hitting the rocky coastline

segments.scene_description: The path opens onto a wide rocky shoreline as the character exits the forest. An NPC is visible walking ahead toward the water. The horse descends onto the rocky beach where the ocean waves are breaking, and the distant ship is now prominently visible from shore level, anchored near the coast in the fading light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high coastal overlook down through a wooded trail and onto a rocky shoreline at sunset. It begins behind a samurai on horseback overlooking the ocean, where a mysterious ship with a cross-shaped mast is silhouetted against a purple sky. As the character moves forward, the camera follows along a narrow dirt trail hugging the cliffside before the environment shifts into a densely wooded section of tall pine trees that temporarily obscure the horizon. The scene then opens as the horse exits the forest and descends onto a wide rocky beach where waves break against the shore. Finally, the camera reveals an NPC walking ahead toward the water, with the distant ship now prominently visible from the shoreline in the fading light.
